meta.description: Depth analysis of every Pastorsimon1798 repo — what each IS, its purpose, size, and relationship to Liminal
meta.method: GitHub API mining: metadata, file trees, README content

prompt-optimizer.description: AI prompt workbench for teams — compare templates, stream completions from OpenRouter, bilingual UI
prompt-optimizer.readme_summary: Prompt Optimizer helps teams craft effective AI prompts, compare templates, and stream real-time completions from OpenRouter. Workbench with guided form, history management, bilingual UI support, and optional AI refinement.

web.description: Puente Ops Hub website — Astro-based business site for PuenteWorks AI consulting
web.readme_summary: Puente Ops website. Deployment config for Netlify at puenteopshub.netlify.app.

tarot-content-creator.description: Local-only tarot card reading tool — photo to AI interpretation via Gemini Pro Vision, saved to localStorage
tarot-content-creator.readme_summary: Turns a photo of a tarot spread into an AI-generated interpretation using google/gemini-pro-vision via OpenRouter. React 19 + Vite frontend, Express server, localStorage persistence. Supports Ollama and LM Studio for local AI.

Pottery-App.description: Pottery AI PWA — text-to-3D clay model generation with Three.js viewer, targeting pottery studios
Pottery-App.readme_summary: Mobile-first PWA that helps potters turn text ideas into interactive 3D clay models using ultra-low-cost AI. React + Three.js viewer, PWA with offline caching. 240x cheaper than competitors. Includes meta-PRD, PRD1, and technical specifications.

DECLuTTER-AI.description: ADHD-friendly decluttering assistant — Flutter app with camera capture, 10-minute sprint timer, TFLite detection
DECLuTTER-AI.readme_summary: Flutter scaffolding for ADHD-friendly decluttering assistant. Camera capture, clutter zone preview, 10-minute sprint timer with ADHD guardrails. Uses camera, permission_handler, image, and tflite_flutter packages.

noise.sh.description: Rapid-capture songwriting studio — Go TUI with Bubble Tea, voice dictation via whisper.cpp, Elm Architecture
noise.sh.readme_summary: Local-first AI-assisted TUI for songwriting. Combines professional songwriting pedagogy with Bubble Tea terminal interface. Modular monolith with Elm Architecture. Features: instant capture, voice dictation (whisper.cpp), split-pane editor, SQLite storage, Ollama for local LLM. Part of the Kyanite Suite.

focus.sh.description: AI-powered CLI task manager — Go TUI with Charm libraries, natural language parsing, calendar, 10 color themes
focus.sh.readme_summary: Intelligent CLI task management within the Kyanite Suite. Natural language parsing with Ollama/OpenRouter, beautiful TUI with 10 themes (Amber Night default), calendar integration, interactive wizards. Go 1.21+ with Charm libraries.

lean-study-buddy-extension.description: VS Code extension for neurodivergent devs — AI study buddy, voice interaction, dyslexia-friendly fonts
lean-study-buddy-extension.readme_summary: VS Code extension for neurodivergent developers (ADHD, dyslexia). AI-powered guidance, voice interaction, plain-language code explanations. Study Buddy Panel, manual summaries, Browser TTS, dyslexia-friendly fonts. Planned: voice dictation, context tracking, focus timers, agent integration.

Farm-to-Stars.description: AI-driven grand strategy game — cozy civilization builder powered by narrative AI with Minimax integration
Farm-to-Stars.readme_summary: AI-driven grand strategy game. Cozy civilization builder powered by narrative AI. React + TypeScript with AI provider layer, scenario definitions, game state management. 'Farm-to-Stars Pivot' — pivoted from farming sim to strategy.

CyberWitches.description: Hex Compiler — idle game about programming magic before it disappears. Compile spells into hex code
CyberWitches.readme_summary: 'Magic is fading. You are a Hex Compiler — one of the last who can translate magical hexes into hexadecimal code.' Idle game about programming magic before it disappears. Build digital preservation chambers and fight the fading.

VoxForge.description: Voice-to-music browser tool — record singing/humming/beatboxing, extract melody as MIDI, generate full arrangements
VoxForge.readme_summary: Transform voice into music — browser-based tool that turns vocal recordings into complete music arrangements. Pitch detection (YIN), BPM detection, key detection, drum/bass/chord generation, stem export (WAV), MIDI export, AI lyrics via OpenAI-compatible APIs. Next.js 15, Tone.js, React 19.

Prism.sh.description: Terminal-based color palette design tool — Go TUI with color theory education and WCAG validation
Prism.sh.readme_summary: Terminal-based color palette design and theory tool. Interactive TUI with comprehensive color theory education and WCAG accessibility validation. v1.0.0 complete. Part of the Kyanite Suite.

Syntax.sh.description: Terminal-based fiction writing and worldbuilding tool — Go TUI with character tracking, scene management
Syntax.sh.readme_summary: Beautiful distraction-free writing environment for authors. Write stories, manage characters, organize scenes, track plots, build worlds — all in terminal. 10 Kyanite themes, project management, character database, scene organization. Planned: split-pane editor, ASCII relationship maps, export to PDF/DOCX.

MutualAidApp.description: Community mutual aid platform — resource locator, needs/offers board, volunteer scheduling, pod micro-circles
MutualAidApp.readme_summary: MutualCircle — 98% complete community mutual aid platform. Resource Locator (211 API), Needs & Offers Board with smart matching, Volunteer Scheduling with SMS/email reminders, Pods/Micro-Circles. FastAPI + PostgreSQL + PostGIS + SQLAlchemy. 14 languages supported.

FlowCLI.description: ADHD-friendly AI coding assistant — Python CLI with quality gates, voice interface, session memory, break reminders
FlowCLI.readme_summary: AI-powered coding assistant designed for neurodivergent developers. Pre-production quality gates, post-production checks, optional voice interface. ADHD-friendly: progress indicators, chunked output, session memory, break reminders. Privacy-first: local LLMs (Qwen 3 Coder) for sensitive code.

EvoLab.description: Browser-based evolution simulator — design species, watch natural selection, 55+ genetic traits, PixiJS
EvoLab.readme_summary: Play evolution in your browser. Design species, watch them evolve through natural selection. Cell stage gameplay, ATP energy system, 55+ genetic traits across 7 categories, reproduction system, trait editor UI. PixiJS 8.5, React, TypeScript 5.7. Achievement and leaderboard systems.

Generative-Score-Lab.description: AI-powered adaptive game soundtrack composer — Euclidean rhythms, Markov chains, arpeggiators, real-time playback
Generative-Score-Lab.readme_summary: AI-powered music composition for adaptive game soundtracks. Scene-based composition, AI assistant (OpenRouter/Minimax/GLM/Ollama), multiple generators (Euclidean rhythms, arpeggiator, Markov chains, random walk), real-time Web Audio playback, MIDI export, interactive tutorial. 32 tests passing.

Generative-Assets-Lab.description: Local-first game asset generator — text-to-sprite with AI, local SQLite storage, transparent background extraction
Generative-Assets-Lab.readme_summary: Local-first web app generating game-ready 2D assets using cloud AI. Text-to-sprite generation via OpenRouter (Gemini 2.5 Flash), Google Imagen 3, DALL-E 3. Image-to-sprite conversion with transparent background. Local SQLite + filesystem storage. Full-text search, favorites, batch export.

GameStory-Lab.description: AI game design document generator — mechanics, lore, validation, genre templates, AI model orchestration
GameStory-Lab.readme_summary: Helps indie game devs create professional GDDs with AI. Flexible workflow (start with mechanics or lore), AI model orchestration (DeepSeek, Qwen 3, Phi-4, Gemini, Ollama), 26 validation rules across 6 categories, 15 genre templates, genre blending, iterative refinement, professional export.

ShipLab.description: Post-production AI tool — transform finished code into shipped, marketed, maintained products
ShipLab.readme_summary: Local-first web app helping developers transform finished code into shipped products. AI-powered analysis, documentation generation, licensing assistance, marketing content, deployment guidance. Next.js 15, SQLite + Drizzle ORM, Ollama/OpenRouter LLM integration, shadcn/ui.

voice-to-scultpure-app.description: Voice-to-3D ceramic sculpture studio — real-time audio analysis shapes pottery, STL/GLTF export with ceramic constraints
voice-to-scultpure-app.readme_summary: Transform voice into 3D ceramic sculptures using real-time audio analysis. Sing, hum, or speak to shape pottery. Layer system, workspaces (Sculpt, Glaze, Force, Export). Song mode for high-res capture. Ceramic constraints (hand access, clay smoothing). STL, GLTF/GLB export. PBR materials.

cursor-code-analyzer.description: Professional-grade static analysis VS Code extension — AI-powered fixes, 12+ languages, conservative high-confidence checks
cursor-code-analyzer.readme_summary: Code Analyzer Pro v8.6.0 — Professional static analysis with AI-powered fixes. 12+ languages, conservative high-confidence checks (quality over quantity), Ollama and OpenAI integration. Philosophy: 2-3 high-value checks per language, not 50 noisy ones.

3d-Designer.description: VoiceForge 3D — voice-first AI-powered parametric 3D design for 3D printing using JSCAD
3d-Designer.readme_summary: Voice-first AI-powered parametric 3D design for 3D printing. Speak naturally to generate JSCAD code. Phi-4 Mini (Ollama) as default on-device AI. DFM knowledge built in. Knows standard component dimensions (Raspberry Pi, Arduino, NEMA17). Export to Orca Slicer.

Print-OS.description: CAEDO Ecosystem — integrated voice-first parametric 3D design and manufacturing platform
Print-OS.readme_summary: CAEDO (Latin for 'I cut/sculpt') — integrated 3D design & manufacturing platform. Voice-first parametric CAD with Next.js 16 frontend and FastAPI backend. Smart routing and costing. Evolution of 3d-Designer into a full ecosystem.

apex-vault.description: APEX engineering rules system for AI coding assistants — token-optimized ruleset for Cursor, transforms AI into senior engineer
apex-vault.readme_summary: APEX (Autonomous Programming EXcellence) — token-optimized ruleset that transforms AI coding assistants into senior engineering leads with consistent behavior, quality gates, and specialized skills. Installs as global rules for Cursor via ~/.cursor/rules/apex.md.

LifeOS.description: Innerscape Suite — 100% TypeScript self-awareness, productivity, and health system with React Native mobile
LifeOS.readme_summary: Innerscape Suite — cohesive TypeScript suite for self-awareness, productivity, and health. React Native (Expo) mobile app for Mind, Flow, Body (Somatic/Pulse), Hub. Next.js Web Shell for analysis and goals. Hono + Cloudflare Workers backend. Turso database, PowerSync, Clerk auth.

liam-private.description: Private backup of Liam identity — APEX rules, custom content, creative projects, behavioral configuration
liam-private.readme_summary: Private backup of everything that makes 'Liam' unique — identity files, behavioral rules, custom skills, and creative projects. Contains clawd/ (Liam identity), liminal/ (creative projects), apex-vault/ (APEX rules v7.x), skills/ (custom automations). Source of truth for Liam's identity.

lyrics-engine.description: Standalone lyrics writing tool — rhyme engine, syllable counter, AI generation, song structure templates
lyrics-engine.readme_summary: Standalone lyrics writing tool with rhyme engine, syllable counter, AI generation, and song structure templates. Perfect/slant/multi-syllable rhymes, stress pattern detection, flow analysis. Pop, rap, ballad, punk, singer-songwriter templates. Collaborative mode: Simon writes, Liam refines.

cerafica-site.description: Cerafica ceramics portfolio website — HTML site showcasing ceramic work
cerafica-site.readme_summary: Cerafica ceramics portfolio site. Large HTML-based site for showcasing ceramic artwork.

neurodivergent-directory.description: Niche directory for late-diagnosed neurodivergent BIPOC adults — connecting with culturally affirming professionals
neurodivergent-directory.readme_summary: Niche directory connecting late-diagnosed neurodivergent BIPOC adults with culturally affirming professionals, resources, and community. Planning stage. Addresses underdiagnosis and lack of culturally affirming care for BIPOC adults.

Interpreted-Context-Methdology.description: ICM — folder structure as agent architecture, replaces framework orchestration with filesystem structure and numbered stages
Interpreted-Context-Methdology.readme_summary: Fork of Jake Van Clief's ICM. Folder structure as agent architecture — replaces framework-level orchestration with filesystem structure. Numbered folders = stages, markdown files = prompts. One agent reading right files at right moment does the work of a multi-agent framework. Unix pipeline principles applied to AI orchestration.

research-pipeline-prod.description: Personal research pipeline workspace with human-door integration — Python-based
research-pipeline-prod.readme_summary: Personal research pipeline workspace with human-door integration. Small experimental repo (259 KB).

GlazeLab.description: Ceramic glaze research lab — glaze layering combinations, visual analysis with AI (Gemini, Kimi), openglaze submodule
GlazeLab.readme_summary: Ceramic glaze research lab with openglaze as submodule. Contains glaze layering combinations, visual analysis raw data (Gemini 3 Flash, Kimi K2.5 analyses), quality gates, progress tracking. Includes Claude skill for ceramic glaze reverse engineering.

creative-portfolio.description: Simon Gonzalez de Cruz creative technologist portfolio — CSS-based personal site
creative-portfolio.readme_summary: Simon Gonzalez de Cruz — Creative Technologist Portfolio. Minimal CSS-based personal portfolio.

openglaze.description: Open-source ceramic glaze management SaaS — unlimited glazes, firing logs, photo docs, recipe calculator, team collaboration
openglaze.readme_summary: Professional ceramic glaze management system. 100% open source. Unlimited glazes, firing logs, photo documentation, recipe calculator, analytics, team collaboration. Docker-ready, self-hostable. Stripe, PayPal, crypto, or manual invoicing.

reverse-engineering.description: Universal reverse engineering methodology and tools — TypeScript-based systematic approach to understanding systems
reverse-engineering.readme_summary: Universal reverse engineering methodology and tools. Large repo (22 MB) actively updated as of 2026-04-01. Contains experimental reverse engineering work including agents/build/executors, topic-specific legacy code, and ceramics reverse engineering.

atelier.description: Creative Coding Agent — generative art system with Ralph-Wiggum Loop for self-recursive iteration and improvement
atelier.readme_summary: Creative coding agent that generates emergent generative art through self-recursive iteration. The same prompt runs repeatedly with changing world/context creating a feedback loop where the agent critiques and improves its own output. Direct predecessor to Liminal — same architecture (Ralph-Wiggum Loop, GUI, CLI, config).

hydra-creative-agent.description: Autonomous creative AI agent — MAP-Elites quality-diversity, novelty search, multi-domain generation (ASCII, MIDI, code-art)
hydra-creative-agent.readme_summary: Self-improving creative AI combining MAP-Elites quality-diversity optimization with novelty search. Multi-domain generation (ASCII art, MIDI music, code-art). Autonomous, Collaborative, Curator, and Meta modes. Adaptive aesthetic model, safety guardrails, persistent memory with vector store and lineage tracking.

liminal.description: Self-recursive creative coding agent — Ralph-Wiggum Loop, p5.js visuals, Strudel/Hydra live coding, Compost Mill, aesthetic guardrails
liminal.readme_summary: The code evolves. You curate. The system learns. Generative art system with Ralph-Wiggum Loop for self-recursive iteration, p5.js visuals, live music coding (Strudel/Hydra), multi-model swarm generation, deep collaboration, chat-based creative sessions, and a living Compost Mill for digesting creative material.

mcp-video.description: Video editing MCP server for AI agents — 82 tools, 832 tests, FFmpeg + Remotion, works with Claude Code/Cursor
mcp-video.readme_summary: Video editing and creation for AI agents. 82 MCP tools, 3 interfaces, 832 tests (707 fast, 116 slow/remotion). Edit existing video with FFmpeg, create new video from code with Remotion. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, and any MCP client. Local, fast, free. Apache 2.0 license.

awesome-mcp-servers.description: Fork of awesome-mcp-servers list — curated collection of MCP server resources
awesome-mcp-servers.readme_summary: Fork of the awesome-mcp-servers curated list. Reference/resource collection, not original project.

DialectOS.description: Spanish dialect translation MCP server — 16 tools, 20 regional variants, preserves markdown/code/locale structure
DialectOS.readme_summary: Spanish dialect translation server built on MCP. 16 tools for translating, detecting, and adapting content across 20 regional variants (es-ES, es-MX, es-AR, es-CO, etc.). Preserves markdown structure, code comments, and locale file formatting. Monorepo with packages for MCP, CLI, providers, security, types, locale-utils, markdown-parser.

CEO_Agents.description: Multi-agent CEO/leadership system — TypeScript-based agent architecture for executive decision-making
CEO_Agents.readme_summary: CEO Agents — multi-agent system. Small repo (301 KB) with TypeScript. No detailed README available.

Pastorsimon1798.description: GitHub profile README — AI Systems Builder, Multi-Agent Architectures, MCP, Long Beach CA
Pastorsimon1798.readme_summary: Simon Gonzalez De Cruz — AI Systems Builder, Multi-Agent Architectures, MCP, Long Beach CA. 11 years enterprise ops at Capital Group, SCE, PIMCO. Building mcp-video, DialectOS, EF-VA/Liam, Self-Town, Liminal. PuenteWorks (2025-present) — AI consulting for small businesses.

puenteworks-site.description: PuenteWorks business website — AI Systems for Small Business, HTML-based landing page
puenteworks-site.readme_summary: PuenteWorks — AI Systems for Small Business. Minimal HTML landing page.

AIJobs.description: AI job board or job search tool — minimal repo with no detailed description
AIJobs.readme_summary: No detailed README available. Small repo (38 KB) with 8 files. Likely a job board or job search tool concept.

site-to-stitch.description: Reverse-engineer websites into Google Stitch MCP — extract design tokens, generate Stitch screens, analyze variants
site-to-stitch.readme_summary: Transform any website into a Stitch design system. Extract design tokens (colors, typography, spacing), generate .stitch/site-tokens.md, analyze aesthetics, implement variants in Stitch. Requires Stitch MCP Server and headless browser capability.

cerafica.description: Cerafica ceramics business platform — inventory management, Instagram tools, website, feedback system
cerafica.readme_summary: Cerafica ceramics business platform. Large repo (146 MB) with inventory management (available/process/sold), Instagram scripts with requirements, website, feedback tools. Comprehensive business-in-a-box for the ceramics practice.

Creator-kit.description: Minimal creator toolkit — 2 files, likely a placeholder or concept
Creator-kit.readme_summary: Creator-kit. Minimal repo with README only. Concept or placeholder.

research-scout.description: Opportunity scout — GitHub, Product Hunt, Hacker News → scoring → briefs → Paperclip API tickets
research-scout.readme_summary: Standalone tool pulling product opportunities from GitHub, Product Hunt, and Hacker News. Scores them, writes opportunity briefs (JSON + Markdown), optionally opens tickets in Paperclip via HTTP API. Split out of Paperclip monolith for independent evolution.

creative_dna.description: The themes, patterns, and obsessions that recur across all 50 repos — the creative DNA that fed into Liminal
recurring_themes: Self-recursive improvement: systems that iterate on their own output (atelier → hydra → liminal Ralph-Wiggum Loop)
Quality-diversity optimization: MAP-Elites, novelty search, scoring across multiple dimensions (hydra → liminal scoring engine)
Voice as creative input: voice-to-music (VoxForge), voice-to-3D (voice-to-sculpture, 3d-Designer, Print-OS), voice dictation (noise.sh)
Neurodivergent-first design: ADHD-friendly interfaces across FlowCLI, DECLuTTER-AI, lean-study-buddy, focus.sh, LifeOS
Generative music: Euclidean rhythms, Markov chains, adaptive scoring (Generative-Score-Lab → liminal Strudel/Hydra)
Evolutionary systems: natural selection sim (EvoLab), MAP-Elites (hydra), creative evolution (liminal Compost Mill)
Ceramics as digital practice: pottery AI, glaze management, voice-to-sculpture, the entire cerafica ecosystem
Terminal/TUI aesthetics: the entire Kyanite Suite (noise.sh, focus.sh, Prism.sh, Syntax.sh) — beautiful terminal tools
Multi-agent AI: CEO_Agents, hydra multi-mode, liminal swarm generation, ICM filesystem orchestration
Local-first + privacy: repeated pattern of Ollama/local LLM support alongside cloud APIs across nearly every project
Iterative creative loops: every project has some form of generate → evaluate → refine cycle
Cross-domain creative synthesis: combining music + visuals + code + ceramics in unexpected ways
language_progression: Go (noise.sh, focus.sh, Prism.sh, Syntax.sh, Oct-Nov 2025) → Kyanite Suite TUI tools
JavaScript (tarot, CyberWitches, MutualAidApp, Nov 2025) → web-first experiments
Python (FlowCLI, lyrics-engine, hydra, mcp-video, openglaze, Nov 2025-Mar 2026) → AI/ML tooling
TypeScript (atelier, liminal, DialectOS, all Labs, Mar 2026) → final consolidation into TypeScript ecosystem
domain_progression: AI tooling (Sep 2025): prompt-optimizer, tarot-content-creator — learning AI APIs
Mobile/ceramics (Sep 2025): Pottery-App, DECLuTTER-AI — mobile-first creative tools
Terminal tools (Oct-Nov 2025): Kyanite Suite (noise.sh, focus.sh, Prism.sh, Syntax.sh) — Go TUI mastery
Games (Nov 2025): Farm-to-Stars, CyberWitches, EvoLab — AI-driven game mechanics
Creative labs (Nov 2025): Generative-Score-Lab, Generative-Assets-Lab, GameStory-Lab, ShipLab — AI-assisted creation
Voice + ceramics (Nov 2025-Feb 2026): VoxForge, voice-to-sculpture, 3d-Designer, Print-OS — voice as creative interface
Ceramics business (Feb-Mar 2026): cerafica, GlazeLab, openglaze — ceramics as business
Agent architecture (Mar 2026): ICM, atelier, hydra-creative-agent — creative agent consolidation
Liminal + MCP ecosystem (Mar 2026): liminal, mcp-video, DialectOS, CEO_Agents — mature system building

key_transitions.kyanite_suite_to_liminal: The Kyanite Suite (noise.sh, focus.sh, Prism.sh, Syntax.sh) established the pattern of beautiful, themed creative tools. Liminal inherited this aesthetic sensibility and the idea of themed creative environments.
key_transitions.game_labs_to_liminal: Generative-Score-Lab, GameStory-Lab, and EvoLab explored generative algorithms (Euclidean rhythms, Markov chains, evolutionary systems). These algorithms were mined directly into Liminal's creative pipeline.
key_transitions.hydra_to_liminal: Hydra's MAP-Elites quality-diversity optimization and novelty search became Liminal's scoring engine and aesthetic guardrails. The multi-mode operation (Autonomous, Collaborative, Curator, Meta) informed Liminal's chat-based creative sessions.
key_transitions.atelier_to_liminal: Atelier IS the direct code predecessor. Same Ralph-Wiggum Loop architecture, same CLI+GUI structure, same ConfigLoader pattern. Liminal forked from atelier and added Compost Mill, audio analysis, aesthetic critics, and Strudel/Hydra live coding.
key_transitions.ceramics_to_liminal: The ceramics practice (Pottery-App, voice-to-sculpture, cerafica, GlazeLab, openglaze) informed Liminal's physical materiality metaphor — the Compost Mill digests creative material like clay, fires it, and produces new forms.
key_transitions.flowcli_to_liminal: FlowCLI's ADHD-friendly design patterns (progress indicators, chunked output, session memory, break reminders) informed Liminal's collaboration UX and session management.
